data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Q3: Earnings Hit The Mark, Sales Fall Short & Boosts Portfolio With Energy Drink Business GHOST
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper's Q3 sales fell short of estimates at $3.89 billion, while the company announced the acquisition of a majority stake in GHOST Lifestyle to bolster its energy drink portfolio.

data.title: Valero Energy Delivers Solid Q3: Ethanol, Renewable Diesel Volumes Rise
data.description: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) reported Q3 FY24 revenues of $32.876B, beating consensus. Adj. EPS exceeded consensus. Refining segment income down.

data.title: Intel Triumphs Over EU Regulators In Two-Decades-Long Antitrust Dispute
data.description: The court dismissed the European Commission's appeal, thereby upholding an earlier decision by the General Court.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says He Would Not Buy This Health Care Stock At This Level: 'Wait For A Pullback'
data.description: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said no to Nextracker. "Nextracker's a mistake that I made," he added.

data.title: Southwest Airlines Beats Q3 Street Expectations, Secures Agreement With Elliott Management-Driven Board Overhaul
data.description: Southwest Airlines reported Q3 results, beating revenue & EPS consensus. Operating income & expenses down. New directors appointed. Q4 guidance released.
